name: Artiva Biotherapeutics, Inc.
business: Artiva Biotherapeutics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing allogeneic NK cell-based therapies for autoimmune diseases and cancer. Its lead product candidate AlloNK is in clinical development for use in combination with B-cell targeted monoclonal antibodies. The company has no products approved for commercial sale.
sellsTo: Autoimmune disease patients (e.g., rheumatoid arthritis, lupus nephritis, systemic lupus erythematosus)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company with a limited operating history.

catalysts.event: Completion of Phase 1/2 B-NHL clinical trial and discontinuation of long-term follow-up to focus on autoimmune indications
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we completed this trial and decided to discontinue the remaining long term follow up period to focus our resources on pursuing autoimmune indications.
